extension.name: simple-mcp-server
extension.title: FastAPI: MCP Server
extension.description: A FastAPI server that exposes tools to AI assistants over the Model Context Protocol (MCP), running on Connect. Its tools run as the signed-in viewer, using their Connect identity instead of an API key, and ship as demos you can replace with your own. Meant to be used with the Python Shiny: AI Chat with MCP Tools extension, but works with any MCP client.
